questions.text: You are preparing for a meeting with school leaders regarding students performance in a class. On the 'Results' worksheet, use an Excel feature to group all the table rows that have a value of 'A' in the 'Section' column

On the 'Results' worksheet, in the 'Exam Results' table, create a conditional formatting rule. use a formula to format the 'Name' column in Red text color(from the Standard Colors palette) if the average of the four exam results is less than 60
In the 'Report' macro, update the 'PrintGridlines' properties so that the macro automatically prints the rows 1:3 as title rows and does not print the gridlines
On the 'Summary' worksheet, in cell A4, create a PivoTable using the data in the 'Exam Results' table of the 'Results' worksheet
